array.string:
/bin/launchctl setenv XDG_CACHE_HOME "$HOME/.cache" /bin/launchctl setenv XDG_CONFIG_HOME "$HOME/.config" /bin/launchctl setenv XDG_DATA_HOME "$HOME/.local/share" /bin/launchctl setenv XDG_STATE_HOME "$HOME/.local/state"
/bin/launchctl setenv BASH_COMPLETION_USER_FILE "$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/bash_completion" /bin/launchctl setenv GRADLE_USER_HOME "$XDG_DATA_HOME/gradle" /bin/launchctl setenv NPM_CONFIG_USERCONFIG "$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/npm/npmrc" /bin/launchctl setenv NODE_REPL_HISTORY "$XDG_DATA_HOME/node_repl_history" /bin/launchctl setenv WORKON_HOME "$XDG_DATA_HOME/virtualenvs" /bin/launchctl setenv HISTFILE "$XDG_STATE_HOME/bash/history" /bin/launchctl setenv INPUTRC "$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/readline/inputrc" /bin/launchctl setenv RIPGREP_CONFIG_PATH "$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/ripgrep/config" /bin/launchctl setenv GDBHISTFILE "$XDG_DATA_HOME/gdb/history" /bin/launchctl setenv RUSTUP_HOME "$XDG_DATA_HOME/rustup" /bin/launchctl setenv CARGO_HOME "$XDG_DATA_HOME/cargo" /bin/launchctl setenv GOPATH "$XDG_DATA_HOME/go" /bin/launchctl setenv PYLINTHOME "$XDG_CACHE_HOME/pylint" /bin/launchctl setenv PASSWORD_STORE_DIR "$XDG_DATA_HOME/pass" /bin/launchctl setenv K9SCONFIG "$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/k9s" /bin/launchctl setenv TEXMFHOME "$XDG_DATA_HOME/texmf" /bin/launchctl setenv TEXMFVAR "$XDG_CACHE_HOME/texlive/texmf-var" /bin/launchctl setenv TEXMFCONFIG "$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/texlive/texmf-config"
